home.bio: I am an iOS and Frontend Developer passionate about turning ideas into high-impact digital products. With a strong dedication to solving complex problems and crafting exceptional interfaces, I always strive to build applications that bring real value to people's lives.

brotto.tagline: Local plant care: photos and logs without servers
brotto.description: Brotto is a plant monitoring app that keeps your photos and watering logs safely on your private device.

footer.bio: Frontend & iOS Developer passionate about creating valuable solutions and high-quality crafting to make a positive impact.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy outlines how the developer Felipe Casalecchi collects, uses, and safeguards your information when using the Brotto application ("App").
privacy.section1Intro: Brotto functions primarily as a digital, local plant journal.
privacy.s1p1: Local Data (Photos & Logs): Core functionalities happen exclusively on your device. We never upload your plant photos to external servers.
privacy.s1p2: Personal Information: We do not actively collect personally identifiable information (PII) such as Name, Email, or User Accounts.
privacy.s1p3: Sensitive Data: We do not collect health or exact location data (a weather feature may be added soon without breaching anonymity rules).
privacy.s1p4: Usage Analytics: We use analytical services to track anonymous user retention metrics to help improve stability.
privacy.section2Intro: The app relies on trusted third-party services:
privacy.s2p1: RevenueCat: Used to manage and securely process in-app subscriptions.
privacy.s2p2: Analytics: Background tracking metrics as stated prior.
privacy.s3p1: Your offline journal content cannot be leaked from our servers because they are solely on your device. However, no internet transmission is 100% secure.
privacy.s4p1: The App may contain third-party links not run by us. We advise checking their privacy terms.
privacy.s5p1: Changes to this document will be reflected here and potentially communicated via App release notes.
privacy.s6p1: If you have questions regarding data privacy, please email us at:
